description: Perform a multiple sequence alignment using the MUSCLE algorithm on the hemoglobin beta protein FASTA file (~/UGENE_Data/hemoglobin_beta_multispecies.fasta). This file contains sequences from 8 species (Human, Mouse, Chicken, Frog, Zebrafish, Cow, Horse, and Pig) from UniProt. Save the aligned result in ClustalW format to ~/UGENE_Data/results/hemoglobin_alignment.aln. The alignment should demonstrate conserved regions and evolutionary relationships between the proteins.

metadata.data_source: UniProt hemoglobin beta subunit sequences (P68871, P02088, P02112, P02132, Q90485, P02070, P02062, P02067)
